note: Regression reference for CI `ci:gate` (absolute ceilings + relative ±50% vs this file). Checker never auto-rewrites or auto-relaxes baselines. To refresh after intentional perf work: (1) pnpm build from repo root, (2) pnpm --filter @moolam/benchmarks baseline:record, (3) pnpm --filter @moolam/benchmarks ci:gate, (4) open a PR that updates gates/baseline.json with rationale — never push baseline-only without review.
